utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format contains 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all 5 items appear: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The plan also includes an extra 'mental_health_coverage' item that is not required by the format. Each of the required items is fully specified: health_coverage includes physical health (though mental health is separated, the physical coverage includes costs), property_coverage has home/contents and costs, travel_coverage has coverage and costs, additional_services has enhancements and costs, and total_budget includes a complete cost breakdown. Thus, all 5 required items are present and complete.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant selected 'HealthFirst' for all major coverage categories. In the ground-truth dataset, the corresponding HealthFirst entries are found under: 'primary_health_coverage.physical_health.HealthFirst Standard Plan' (rating 7) for health coverage, 'primary_health_coverage.mental_health.HealthFirst Standard Plan' (rating 6) for mental health coverage, 'property_protection.home_content.HomeFirst Standard Coverage' (rating 9) for property coverage, and there is no 'HealthFirst' travel insurance listed, so the closest match is absent from ground truth. However, since the travel coverage is labeled 'HealthFirst' in the final plan, it is most consistent to map it to the missing entry, assigning no rating if not found. There are no direct ratings for 'additional_services', so it is not mapped.
